title: puccinellia limosa f. pallens
intro: Puccinellia limosa f. pallens, also known as saltwort or saltmarsh grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is commonly found in coastal areas and salt marshes. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Puccinellia limosa f. pallens is prepared as a tea or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
